violations.text: Observed mini freezer with ice accumulation located in the kitchen area with hinge not in good repair/in need of adjustment. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Kitchen door gasket was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

Observed the outside dumpsters with covers opened. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept with covers closed in between use. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

Hamburger was observed held at 98 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was observed in steam table double panned. PIC removed double pan. Hamburger was delivered 1 hour ago above 135 degrees. Food will be served withing the next 15 minutes. Moving forward, PIC will only place food in single pan. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

The steam table bay on the left side area was not in good repair. Water in bay was only able to reach 82. PIC to get unit serviced. Bay to not be used until it can adequately hold food above 135. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023

The steam table bay on the left side area was not in good repair. Water in bay was only able to reach 122. PIC to get unit serviced. Bay to not be used until it can adequately hold food above 135. New Violation. Correct By: 10/12/2023
